_publications._publicationTitle: NF1-Specific Growth Charts for Head Circumference Over the First 3 Years of Life.

_contextSnippet: NF1 head circumference Z scores computed using LMSz and CHOP charts were highly correlated (intraclass correlation coefficient (ICC) = 0.97
details: GAMLSS method was used to construct CHOP growth charts, showing NF1 head circumference Z scores highly correlated with LMSz method (ICC = 0.97)
